docs.title: Hunters Farm
docs.text:
Hunters Farm consists of 23 acres in the High Weald of East Sussex.  We have a small flock of pedigree Shetland sheep.

These slow-growing, 100% grass-fed lambs are slaughtered at between 1 and 2 years old for the tastiest, tenderest meat.

We sell a whole lamb for £113 or half lamb for £62.  All the meat is professionally butchered and vacuum-packed.  Available fresh by appointment or frozen, subject to availability, all year round.

If you are interested in buying lamb from us,

docs.title: How to find us
docs.text:
• Satnav to Postcode TN32 5HU. This will actually take you to a spot about a mile away. From here, take the road signposted MOUNTFIELD for just under a mile, then see the sign for Hunters Farm on your left.
  • Using Google Maps, search for the Google Plus code, which is"XC8G+C3 Robertsbridge" NB if you are less than 30 miles away, just search for XC8G+C3
  • Using What 3 words: //////nation.puts.digests
  • Using a map (older guests only). The grid reference is TQ703213. Latitude 50°57’57Longitude 0°25’29
